case_title: FAUSS, ARTIE vs. SALZBERG, HOWARD et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SALZBERG, HOWARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 362 NOE STREET #4, SAN FRANCISCO $3,756.39 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,756.39, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PERSUANT TO COST BILL. JUDGMENT AMOUNT OF BACK RENT INCLUDES THE AMOUNT OF $606.39 IN DAILY DAMAGES.
